	cSHAKE256)
	TupleHashc
Create a new TupleHash256 object.
    Args:
       digest_bytes (integer):
        Optional. The size of the digest, in bytes.
        Default is 64. Minimum is 8.
       digest_bits (integer):
        Optional and alternative to ``digest_bytes``.
        The size of the digest, in bits (and in steps of 8).
        Default is 512. Minimum is 64.
       custom (bytes):
        Optional.
        A customization bytestring (``S`` in SP 800-185).
    :Return: A :class:`TupleHash` object
    
digest_bytesN
digest_bitsz*Only one digest parameter must be provided)
z!'digest_bytes' must be at least 8z0'digest_bytes' must be at least 64 in steps of 8
custom
Unknown parameters: )
	TypeError
ValueError
strr
kwargsr
B/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/Cryptodome/Hash/TupleHash256.py
new#
TupleHash128r
<module>
